## fivif/OmniKB

> [!info]
> ŌŁÉ 37 ┬Ę Python ┬Ę 2026-06-05  
> [GitHub](https://github.com/fivif/OmniKB)  
> `#Knowledge Base System` `#Scenario-based Application` `#Automated Generation` 
> OmniKB is a scenario-based knowledge base Q&A system that supports multi-source knowledge aggregation and automatic generation of structured Wiki pages. Users can import knowledge sources by uploading documents, pasting text, or scraping URLs, and configure dedicated system prompts and UI templates for each scenario. Its core technologies include zero-embedding overhead knowledge base construction, knowledge graph visualization, and one-click publishing, suitable for various applications such as enterprise customer service and educational training.
> <sub>Universal AI Knowledge Base Agent</sub>

> aBaiAutoplus is a multi-platform AI account auto-registration and management system that supports one-click subscription to ChatGPT Plus via protocol-based payments. It integrates various payment methods (such as PayPal and GoPay) and offers plugin extension capabilities, suitable for multiple AI platforms. The project features robust account lifecycle management, success rate dashboards, and real-time logging, ideal for users needing bulk registration and management of AI accounts.

## lynote-ai/humanize-text

> [!info]
> ŌŁÉ 1,081 ┬Ę Python ┬Ę 2026-06-08  
> [GitHub](https://github.com/lynote-ai/humanize-text) ┬Ę [Website](https://lynote.ai/ai-humanizer)  
> `#Text Humanization` `#AI Detection Bypass` `#Deep Learning` `#ai-detection` `#ai-humanize` `#ai-humanizer` `#ai-tools` `#dify` `#gptzero-bypass` `#humanize-ai` `#humanize-ai-text` `#humanize-text` `#humanizer` `#n8n` `#openclaw` 
> Lynote Humanize Text is an open-source toolkit designed to convert AI-generated content into natural, human-like writing, effectively bypassing Turnitin and other major AI detectors. The project features various humanization methodologies, with the recommended Standard Pipeline combining deep learning rewriting and multi-engine translation to ensure optimal information retention and writing style fidelity. Users can try the tool online for free without registration.
> <sub>Free open-source AI text humanizer to convert AI-generated content into undetectable, human-like writing. Bypass Turnitin, GPTZero, and all major AI detectors. No sign-up required. Try our unlimited free online tool</sub>

## zarazhangrui/frontend-slides

> [!info]
> ŌŁÉ 20,679 ┬Ę JavaScript ┬Ę 2026-05-26  
> [GitHub](https://github.com/zarazhangrui/frontend-slides)  
> `#HTML Presentations` `#Visual Style Generation` `#PPT Conversion` `#ai-slides` `#anthropic` `#claude` `#claude-code` `#claude-skill` `#generative-ui` `#html` `#presentation` `#slides` `#vibe-coding` 
> Frontend Slides is a tool that enables non-designers to create beautiful, animation-rich HTML presentations effortlessly. Users can select design styles from generated visual previews without needing CSS or JavaScript knowledge. It also supports converting PowerPoint files to web presentations, preserving all content and images, while offering a variety of unique visual styles that avoid common AI aesthetics. The tool is provided as a single HTML file, making it easy to use and customize.
> <sub>Create beautiful slides on the web using a coding agent's frontend skills</sub>

## barry-ran/QuickDesk

> QuickDesk is the first AI-native remote desktop application, open-source and free, featuring a built-in MCP (Model Context Protocol) Server that allows any AI agent to see and control remote computers. Unlike traditional remote desktop tools, QuickDesk extends AI computer usage to any remote machine globally, offering real-time visibility and multi-device orchestration, all built on a high-performance and secure foundation.
> <sub>QuickDesk is the first AI-native remote desktop ŌĆö an open-source, free application with a built-in MCP (Model Context Protocol) Server that lets any AI agent see and control remote computers.</sub>

## jarrodwatts/claude-hud

> Claude HUD is a plugin for Claude Code that provides real-time visualization of context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress. It helps users gain insights into their current session status, ensuring efficiency during development. The plugin utilizes the native statusline API, requiring no additional windows and functioning in any terminal.
> <sub>A Claude Code plugin that shows what's happening - context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress</sub>

## bubbuild/bub

> [!info]
> ŌŁÉ 1,474 ┬Ę Python ┬Ę 2026-06-08  
> [GitHub](https://github.com/bubbuild/bub) ┬Ę [Website](https://bub.build/)  
> `#Python Runtime` `#Multi-Agent Collaboration` `#Hook Architecture` `#Multi-Channel Integration` `#agent` `#agents` `#ai` `#ai-agents` `#aiagentframework` `#bub` `#llms` `#python` 
> Bub is a lightweight Python runtime designed for multi-agent shared environments with a hook-first architecture enabling highly customizable conversational workflows. It manages dialogue state and behavior via pluggable hooks, supports seamless operation across multiple channels like CLI and Telegram, and ensures human-agent collaboration within the same runtime boundary without hidden state. Ideal for building multi-agent collaborative chatbots and automation assistants.
> <sub>Bub it. Build it. A hook-first runtime for agents that live alongside people.</sub>

## estkme-group/openeuicc

> [!info]
> ŌŁÉ 839 ┬Ę Kotlin ┬Ę 2026-06-04  
> [GitHub](https://github.com/estkme-group/openeuicc) ┬Ę [Website](https://gitea.angry.im/PeterCxy/OpenEUICC)  
> `#Open Source` `#eSIM Technology` `#Android Application` 
> OpenEUICC is a fully open-source Local Profile Assistant implementation for Android, aimed at resisting Google's lockdown of the Android platform. The project supports both internal and external eSIMs and allows access to eUICC chips via USB CCID readers. Installed as a system app, OpenEUICC offers extensive support for eUICC chips, targeting Android 11 and above, emphasizing the principles of free software.
> <sub>Mirror of OpenEUICC, a fully open-source LPA implementation for Android</sub>

> VoxCPM2 is a tokenizer-free Text-to-Speech system that utilizes an end-to-end diffusion autoregressive architecture to generate continuous speech representations. Supporting 30 languages, it features creative voice design and controllable voice cloning, producing audio at up to 48kHz quality. The latest version boasts 2 billion parameters trained on over 2 million hours of multilingual speech data, capable of generating entirely new voices from natural language descriptions and supporting real-time streaming, making it suitable for various creative speech generation applications.
> <sub>VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning</sub>

## TheTom/turboquant_plus

> [!info]
> ŌŁÉ 6,917 ┬Ę Python ┬Ę 2026-06-01  
> [GitHub](https://github.com/TheTom/turboquant_plus)  
> `#KV Cache Compression` `#Local Inference` `#Performance Optimization` 
> TurboQuant+ is an implementation of TurboQuant, focusing on enhancing local LLM inference efficiency through KV cache compression. The project offers experimental integrations that allow benchmarking and quality validation across different hardware and backends. Core technologies include PolarQuant and Walsh-Hadamard rotation, achieving 3.8-6.4x KV cache compression while maintaining near-equivalent decoding speeds in long contexts. Key findings indicate that V compression has negligible effects on attention quality, while K compression is the primary cause of quality degradation.

> `#Context Database` `#AI Agents` `#File System Paradigm` `#agent` `#agentic-rag` `#ai-agents` `#clawbot` `#context-database` `#context-engineering` `#filesystem` `#llm` `#memory` `#openclaw` `#opencode` `#rag` `#skill` 
> OpenViking is an open-source context database specifically designed for AI Agents, utilizing a file system paradigm to unify the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) required by agents. It addresses fragmentation issues in traditional context management through innovative features like tiered context loading and directory recursive retrieval, enhancing retrieval effectiveness and supporting automatic context iteration, making agents smarter over time. Ideal for AI agent development and optimization.
> <sub>OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.</sub>

> `#Large Language Model` `#High-Performance Inference` `#Cross-Platform Support` `#ggml` 
> llama.cpp is a high-performance C/C++ implementation designed to simplify large language model (LLM) inference across various hardware architectures. It offers a dependency-free implementation optimized for Apple Silicon and multiple x86 and RISC-V architectures, supporting various quantization methods for faster inference and reduced memory usage. The project also includes custom CUDA kernels for NVIDIA GPUs and allows CPU+GPU hybrid inference, suitable for both cloud and local deployments.
> <sub>LLM inference in C/C++</sub>

> llmfit is a terminal tool that right-sizes large language models (LLMs) to your system's RAM, CPU, and GPU. It supports 497 models and 133 providers, evaluating models across quality, speed, and fit dimensions to help users find the best-suited models for their hardware. The tool features an interactive terminal user interface (TUI) and classic CLI mode, supporting multi-GPU setups and dynamic quantization selection, making it ideal for developers and researchers needing efficient model deployment.

> The DingTalk Revoke Message Patcher for PC is a plugin designed for DingTalk desktop versions 6.0 and above, offering various message revocation prevention features, including protection for text, image, file, and voice messages. It supports features like never marking messages as read and watermark removal, making it ideal for users who need to retain important communication content, particularly in work and team collaboration scenarios, ensuring information integrity and traceability.

> LingBot-VLA is a pragmatic Vision-Language-Action foundation model that focuses on large-scale pre-training data and efficient training. It leverages 20,000 hours of real-world data from nine popular dual-arm robot configurations, demonstrating significant superiority in simulation and real-world benchmarks. The model achieves a 1.5 to 2.8 times speedup in training efficiency compared to existing VLA codebases, making it suitable for applications in robotic control and human-robot interaction.

Its technical highlight lies in the integration of sparse mixture of low-rank adapter experts for enhanced multi-task learning in medical Q&A.

> Zhongjing is the first Chinese medical large model that implements a complete training process from pre-training to Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF), based on the LLaMa architecture. It demonstrates excellent dialogue capabilities and has been trained on a dataset of 70,000 real doctor-patient conversations, approaching the level of professional doctors in multi-turn dialogues. Its uniqueness lies in enhancing proactive medical inquiry abilities, improving the model's practicality and safety.

> CMLM-ZhongJing is the first large language model specifically designed for Traditional Chinese Medicine, inspired by the ancient physician Zhang Zhongjing. Its lightweight deployment allows for high-speed inference on a single GPU, aiming to provide reliable intelligent tools for the TCM field.

## knownsec/aipyapp

> [GitHub](https://github.com/knownsec/aipyapp) ┬Ę [Website](https://aipy.app)  
> `#Intelligent Execution` `#Task-Driven` `#Python Integration` 
> Python-Use is a task-driven, result-oriented intelligent execution paradigm that tightly integrates large language models (LLMs) with a Python interpreter to form a complete execution loop. It simplifies traditional AI agent models by eliminating reliance on external tools and plugins, allowing users to provide only a task description while the model autonomously generates and executes Python code, interacting directly with the environment. Python-Use reconnects AI with the real world, ushering in the AI Think Do era.
> <sub>AI-Powered Python & Python-Powered AI (Python-Use)</sub>

> Humanizer-zh is an AI writing de-tracing tool designed for Chinese users, aimed at removing traces of AI-generated content to make texts more natural and human-like. > PDF Craft is an efficient tool focused on converting scanned book PDFs into various formats like Markdown and EPUB. Based on DeepSeek OCR technology, it accurately recognizes complex content such as tables and formulas, completing the conversion locally to ensure content integrity and readability. Its ability to automatically identify document structure makes the conversion process fast and efficient, suitable for handling academic and technical documents.
> <sub>PDF craft can convert PDF files into various other formats. This project will focus on processing PDF files of scanned books.</sub>

> PageIndex is a vectorless, reasoning-based document indexing system designed to enhance retrieval accuracy for long documents. By constructing a hierarchical tree index, it simulates how human experts extract knowledge, enabling context-aware retrieval. This system is particularly suited for scenarios requiring domain expertise and multi-step reasoning, addressing the limitations of traditional vector databases in semantic similarity.

## tencent-ailab/SongBloom

> [!info]
> ŌŁÉ 781 ┬Ę Python ┬Ę 2025-12-04  
> [GitHub](https://github.com/tencent-ailab/SongBloom)  
> `#Music Generation` `#Autoregressive Model` `#Diffusion Model` 
> SongBloom is an innovative framework for full-length song generation that employs an interleaved paradigm of autoregressive sketching and diffusion refinement. It combines the high fidelity of diffusion models with the scalability of language models, gradually extending a musical sketch and refining details from coarse to fine. Experimental results show that SongBloom outperforms existing methods in both subjective and objective metrics, achieving performance comparable to leading commercial music generation platforms, making it suitable for music creation, entertainment, and AI art.
> <sub>The official code repository for SongBloom: Coherent Song Generation via Interleaved Autoregressive Sketching and Diffusion Refinement</sub>

It features an easy-to-use Python API that supports handling both batch and streaming data in development and production environments. By studying agents at scale, CAMEL aims to uncover insights into their behaviors, capabilities, and potential risks, advancing the evolution and application of multi-agent systems.

## davidkimai/Context-Engineering

> [!info]
> ŌŁÉ 9,056 ┬Ę Python ┬Ę 2026-02-27  
> [GitHub](https://github.com/davidkimai/Context-Engineering) ┬Ę [Website](https://deepwiki.com/davidkimai/Context-Engineering)  
> `#Context Design` `#Optimization Techniques` `#Artificial Intelligence` 
> Context Engineering is a cutting-edge discipline that moves beyond traditional prompt engineering, focusing on context design, orchestration, and optimization. This project offers a first-principles handbook that integrates the latest research, helping users effectively fill the context window to enhance model inference capabilities and performance. It is suitable for researchers and developers looking to deepen their understanding and application of context engineering.
> <sub>"Context engineering is the delicate art and science of filling the context window with just the right information for the next step." ŌĆö Andrej Karpathy. A frontier, first-principles handbook inspired by Karpathy and 3Blue1Brown for moving beyond prompt engineering to the wider discipline of context design, orchestration, and optimization.</sub>

> tiktoken is a fast BPE tokenizer designed for OpenAI's models. It performs 3-6 times faster than comparable open-source tokenizers, effectively converting text into tokens that models can understand. It supports arbitrary text and is reversible. Ideal for natural language processing tasks, tiktoken offers an easy-to-use API and extension mechanisms for users to customize encoding methods.
> <sub>tiktoken is a fast BPE tokeniser for use with OpenAI's models.</sub>

## getzep/graphiti

> [!info]
> ŌŁÉ 27,153 ┬Ę Python ┬Ę 2026-06-08  
> [GitHub](https://github.com/getzep/graphiti) ┬Ę [Website](https://help.getzep.com/graphiti)  
> `#Knowledge Graph` `#AI Agents` `#Dynamic Data` `#agents` `#graph` `#llms` `#rag` 
> Graphiti is a framework designed for building and querying temporally-aware knowledge graphs tailored for AI agents in dynamic environments. Unlike traditional retrieval-augmented generation methods, Graphiti continuously integrates user interactions, structured and unstructured enterprise data, and external information into a coherent, queryable graph. It supports incremental data updates, efficient retrieval, and precise historical queries, making it suitable for developing interactive, context-aware AI applications.

> APIPark is a cloud-native, high-performance AI and API gateway designed to help developers and enterprises easily manage and integrate AI services. It supports over 100 mainstream AI models, providing a unified API request and response format that simplifies the use and maintenance of AI models. APIPark features API application and approval, call statistics, load balancing, and quick deployment, making it ideal for scenarios requiring efficient API management.

By caching tool-calling patterns, it enhances task execution speed, reduces variability, and eliminates token costs in repetitive tasks. The library allows developers to implement agents flexibly and ensures safe tool reuse through cache validation, making it an innovative solution for improving AI agent efficiency.

> Dia is a 1.6B parameter text-to-speech model developed by Nari Labs, capable of generating ultra-realistic dialogue in one pass. The model allows output conditioning on audio for emotion and tone control, and can produce non-verbal communications like laughter and coughing. Pretrained model checkpoints and inference code are provided, hosted on Hugging Face, primarily focused on English generation, suitable for research and development requiring high-quality dialogue generation.
> <sub>A TTS model capable of generating ultra-realistic dialogue in one pass.</sub>

The project offers various examples, including generating Excel, PPT, and Word documents, suitable for personal learning and standardized processes in corporate teams. ## python-poetry/poetry

> [!info]
> ŌŁÉ 34,274 ┬Ę Python ┬Ę 2026-06-06  
> [GitHub](https://github.com/python-poetry/poetry) ┬Ę [Website](https://python-poetry.org)  
> `#Dependency Management` `#Python Packaging` `#Project Configuration` `#dependency-manager` `#package-manager` `#packaging` `#poetry` `#python` 
> Poetry is a dependency management and packaging tool for Python projects, designed to simplify the declaration, management, and installation of dependencies. It replaces traditional files like `setup.py` and `requirements.txt` with a simple `pyproject.toml` format, ensuring correct project configuration across environments. Poetry also supports dependency groups and optional dependencies, making project management more flexible and efficient.
> <sub>Python packaging and dependency management made easy</sub>

Refly empowers enterprises to compile standard operating procedures into executable agent skills, enhancing operational efficiency.

> Story-Iter is a training-free iterative framework designed to enhance the quality of long story visualization. By introducing a Global Reference Cross-Attention (GRCA) module, it progressively integrates all reference images from previous rounds, ensuring semantic consistency and fine-grained interactions. Unlike traditional methods relying on fixed reference images, Story-Iter achieves efficient and precise image generation in narratives of up to 100 frames, making it suitable for applications requiring complex storytelling.
> <sub>[ICLR 2026] A Training-free Iterative Framework for Long Story Visualization</sub>

> nvm-desktop is a desktop application designed to manage multiple Node.js versions through a visual interface. It supports macOS, Windows, and Linux, allowing users to easily install, manage, and switch between different Node.js versions independently of OS-specific features. The application provides project-level version isolation, ensuring global dependencies do not interfere with each other. Its smart version detection is powered by nvmd-command, a Rust-based executable, ensuring efficiency and reliability.
> <sub>Node Version Manager Desktop - A desktop application to manage multiple active node.js versions.</sub>

## BlinkDL/RWKV-LM

> [GitHub](https://github.com/BlinkDL/RWKV-LM)  
> `#RNN` `#Large Language Model` `#Efficient Inference` `#attention-mechanism` `#chatgpt` `#deep-learning` `#gpt` `#gpt-2` `#gpt-3` `#language-model` `#linear-attention` `#lstm` `#pytorch` `#rnn` `#rwkv` `#transformer` `#transformers` 
> RWKV is an RNN with exceptional performance in large language models, combining the strengths of RNNs and Transformers with linear time and constant space characteristics, making it suitable for LLM and multimodal applications. RWKV-7 'Goose' supports fast training and infinite context length without kv-cache, offering efficient inference capabilities. The project is completely free, ideal for developers and researchers looking to upgrade models and develop applications.
> <sub>RWKV (pronounced RwaKuv) is an RNN with great LLM performance, which can also be directly trained like a GPT transformer (parallelizable). We are at RWKV-7 "Goose". So it's combining the best of RNN and transformer - great performance, linear time, constant space (no kv-cache), fast training, infinite ctx_len, and free sentence embedding.</sub>

> `#Speech Recognition` `#Video Clipping` `#Large Language Model` `#Speaker Identification` `#ai-tools` `#ai-video-editing` `#content-creation` `#gradio` `#llm` `#speech-recognition` `#speech-to-text` `#subtitles-generator` `#video-clip` `#video-editing` `#video-processing` `#video-subtitles` 
> FunClip is an open-source, accurate, and user-friendly video speech recognition and clipping tool powered by Alibaba's FunASR models. It enables precise ASR with timestamp prediction, supports LLM-based intelligent clipping via Qwen/GPT, allows speaker-specific trimming using CAM++, and offers hotword customization. With Gradio interface, it supports multi-segment clipping, SRT subtitle export, and local/server deployment for both Chinese and English content.
> <sub>Open-source, accurate and easy-to-use video speech recognition & clipping tool. LLM-based AI clipping integrated.</sub>

> Heimdallr is a lightweight notification gateway that aggregates various push channels and features Serverless deployment for nearly zero-cost operation. It is compatible with multiple notification services such as Bark and WeChat Work, offering flexible configuration options and rich functionalities, ideal for developers and teams needing efficient notification delivery. Users can quickly get started with its configuration generator, addressing webhook integration issues.

## huggingface/parler-tts

> [!info]
> ŌŁÉ 5,575 ┬Ę Python ┬Ę 2024-12-10  
> [GitHub](https://github.com/huggingface/parler-tts)  
> `#Text-to-Speech` `#Open-source Model` `#High-Quality Speech` 
> Parler-TTS is a lightweight text-to-speech (TTS) model capable of generating high-quality, natural-sounding speech tailored to specific speaker characteristics such as gender, pitch, and speaking style. This fully open-source project provides all datasets, preprocessing, training code, and weights, enabling the community to develop their own TTS models. The latest release includes two checkpoints, an 880M and a 2.3B parameter model, optimized for faster generation, suitable for various applications.
> <sub>Inference and training library for high-quality TTS models.</sub>

This project addresses the limitations of the original API in mixed-language support and sentence segmentation, allowing users to flexibly configure audio and models via command-line parameters. It supports voice cloning applications in Chinese, Japanese, and English, making it a significant tool in the audio synthesis domain with its straightforward usage and powerful features.

## RVC-Boss/GPT-SoVITS

> [!info]
> ŌŁÉ 58,462 ┬Ę Python ┬Ę 2026-04-30  
> [GitHub](https://github.com/RVC-Boss/GPT-SoVITS)  
> `#Voice Cloning` `#Few-shot Learning` `#Text-to-Speech` `#Cross-lingual Synthesis` `#text-to-speech` `#tts` `#vits` `#voice-clone` `#voice-cloneai` `#voice-cloning` 
> GPT-SoVITS is a powerful few-shot voice conversion and text-to-speech (TTS) system that enables high-quality voice cloning with just 1 minute of training data. It supports zero-shot and few-shot inference, cross-lingual synthesis (Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, Cantonese), and includes a WebUI with tools for voice separation, dataset segmentation, and ASR. With fast inference (RTF as low as 0.014 on RTX 4090), it's ideal for personalized voice applications.
> <sub>1 min voice data can also be used to train a good TTS model! (few shot voice cloning)</sub>

> `#CAPTCHA Recognition` `#OCR Technology` `#Deep Learning` `#captcha` `#ddddocr` `#ocr` 
> DdddOcr is a versatile CAPTCHA recognition SDK that supports offline recognition of various CAPTCHA types, including alphanumeric, Chinese, slider, and special character CAPTCHAs. The library is designed to be simple with minimal dependencies, offering an easy-to-use API for quick integration by developers. Its core features include text recognition, object detection, and slider CAPTCHA handling, with support for GPU acceleration and custom model imports to meet diverse application needs.

> `#Distributed Transactions` `#Microservices Architecture` `#Data Consistency` `#cadence` `#csharp` `#database` `#distributed` `#distributed-transactions` `#dtm` `#go` `#golang` `#java` `#microservice` `#outbox` `#saga` `#seata` `#tcc` `#transaction` `#transactions` `#workflow-engine` `#xa` 
> DTM is a distributed transaction framework that supports various transaction modes such as SAGA, TCC, and XA, aiming for cross-service eventual data consistency. It is applicable in scenarios like cache management, inventory deduction, and non-monolithic order systems. Supporting multiple programming languages and database engines, it features high availability and easy horizontal scaling, effectively addressing data consistency issues in microservices architectures.
> <sub>A distributed transaction framework, supports workflow, saga, tcc, xa, 2-phase message, outbox patterns, supports many languages.</sub>

It is designed to provide fast and accurate Chinese text processing, ideal for developers and applications requiring Chinese segmentation.

Although KPHP has some limitations, such as not supporting certain PHP features, it offers an effective solution for developers needing high-performance PHP applications.

> Antmove is a mini-program converter that simplifies the process of converting Alipay and WeChat mini-programs into mini-programs for other platforms, greatly easing cross-platform development. Key features include one-click conversion, detailed compile and runtime logs, readable generated code, and support for secondary programming, making it ideal for developers to quickly migrate and reuse existing code, enhancing development efficiency.

> This project is a Vue-based draggable component plugin designed for page layout in backend management systems. It divides the interface into three sections: the left for common module components, the middle for draggable composition, and the right for modifying component properties with real-time previews. The plugin enhances user experience and efficiency by allowing dynamic page layout adjustments.

## ventoy/Ventoy

> [!info]
> ŌŁÉ 77,094 ┬Ę C ┬Ę 2026-05-07  
> [GitHub](https://github.com/ventoy/Ventoy) ┬Ę [Website](https://www.ventoy.net)  
> `#Bootable USB` `#Open Source Tool` `#Multi-OS Support` `#arm64` `#auto-install` `#bootable-usb` `#bsd` `#chromeos` `#iso-files` `#legacy` `#linux` `#multiboot` `#persistence` `#secure-boot` `#uefi` `#unattended` `#unix` `#usb` `#windows` `#x86` `#x86-64` 
> Ventoy is an open-source tool designed to simplify the creation of bootable USB drives. Users can simply copy ISO, WIM, IMG, VHD(x), or EFI files to the USB drive without repeated formatting, and boot them through a selection menu. It supports various operating systems, including Windows, Linux, and Unix, compatible with x86 and ARM architectures, and has been tested with over 1300 ISO files, making it suitable for a wide range of applications.
> <sub>A new bootable USB solution.</sub>

> `#Recommender System` `#Multimodal Content` `#AI Algorithms` `#collaborative-filtering` `#go` `#knn` `#machine-learning` `#recommender-system` 
> Gorse is an AI-powered open-source recommender system designed for quick integration into various online services. It supports multiple recommendation algorithms, including classical and LLM-based recommenders, and can handle multimodal content such as text, images, and videos. Gorse offers a user-friendly GUI dashboard and RESTful APIs for data management and recommendation requests, making it suitable for applications requiring personalized recommendations.
> <sub>AI powered open source recommender system engine supports classical/LLM rankers and multimodal content via embedding</sub>

## hezhizheng/go-crontab

> [!info]
> ŌŁÉ 58 ┬Ę Go ┬Ę 2024-12-02  
> [GitHub](https://github.com/hezhizheng/go-crontab)  
> `#Task Scheduling` `#Cross-platform` `#Golang` `#crontab` `#go` `#go-crontab` `#golang` `#golang-crontab` `#windows` `#windows-crontab` 
> Go-Crontab is a task scheduler manager based on Golang, specifically designed for the Windows environment, addressing the lack of effective scheduling tools. It supports both second-level and minute-level task scheduling, automatically recognizing the operating system to execute the corresponding commands. Users can define multiple scheduled tasks through a custom JSON configuration file, with automatic log generation for execution tracking, and it features cross-platform compatibility for Windows, Linux, and MacOS.

The project's technical highlights include flexible configuration options and multi-instance management, catering to both developers and general users.

## goproxy/goproxy.cn

> [!info]
> ŌŁÉ 7,084 ┬Ę HTML ┬Ę 2025-08-20  
> [GitHub](https://github.com/goproxy/goproxy.cn) ┬Ę [Website](https://goproxy.cn)  
> `#Go Module Proxy` `#Network Acceleration` `#Data Integrity` `#china` `#go` `#goproxy` `#module` `#proxy` 
> Goproxy.cn is the most trusted Go module proxy in China, designed to address network restrictions faced by developers in accessing Go modules. Fully implementing the GOPROXY protocol and supported by the renowned cloud service provider Qiniu Cloud, it offers a free, reliable, and globally accelerated service. Goproxy.cn ensures data integrity and security by caching modules in their original state, making it suitable for all Go developers.
> <sub>The most trusted Go module proxy in China.</sub>

> `#AST Transformation` `#Code Refactoring` `#JavaScript Tool` `#ast` `#babel` `#jscodeshift` `#recast` `#vue` 
> GoGoCode is a transformer for JavaScript/TypeScript/HTML based on Abstract Syntax Tree (AST), offering an intuitive API. It features a jQuery-like syntax for selecting and transforming AST, along with a regex-like syntax for code matching and replacement, simplifying the code transformation process. Ideal for developers needing quick refactoring and migration, especially in scenarios like transitioning from Vue and ElementUI to Vue3 and ElementPlus.
> <sub>GoGoCode is a transformer for JavaScript/Typescript/HTML based on AST but providing a more intuitive API.</sub>

> Rocky Linux is a community-driven enterprise operating system designed to be 100% bug-for-bug compatible with Enterprise Linux, serving as an alternative following CentOS's shift in direction. Since June 2021, Rocky Linux has provided stable production-ready releases, focusing on delivering a reliable and transparent OS. The project emphasizes community involvement, ensuring its development is free from corporate interests, suitable for various production environments.
> <sub>Rocky Linux is a community enterprise Operating System designed to be 100% bug-for-bug compatible with Enterprise Linux created in response to the effective discontinuation of CentOS.</sub>

It supports training for both large language models and vision-language models, featuring high performance and low resource consumption. > Laravel Enum is a simple, extensible, and powerful enumeration implementation designed for the Laravel framework. It supports enum key-value pairs, type hinting, attribute casting, and localization, making it suitable for applications requiring enumeration types. However, the library is no longer recommended for new projects as PHP 8.1 offers native enum support, prompting users to consider migration to the native solution.
> <sub>Simple, extensible and powerful enumeration implementation for Laravel.</sub>

Although the project is no longer maintained for new features, its core features include proxy validation, a scoring system, and region-based filtering, making it ideal for scenarios requiring highly available proxies. The project offers a user-friendly WEB management interface for configuring and monitoring the proxy pool status.

> Taichi Lang is an open-source, imperative parallel programming language designed for high-performance numerical computation, embedded in Python. It utilizes a JIT compiler to convert compute-intensive Python code into native GPU or CPU instructions, with broad applications in real-time physical simulation, augmented reality, and artificial intelligence. Taichi Lang stands out for its high compatibility with Python, flexibility, and exceptional performance, making it an ideal choice for scientific computing and graphics rendering.
> <sub>Productive, portable, and performant GPU programming in Python.</sub>

It replaces song source links from various platforms (like QQ, Xiami, etc.) and offers comprehensive traffic proxy features, compatible with multiple clients (Windows, Android, macOS, etc.). The tool also supports proxy settings and custom server IPs, ensuring users can access restricted content and enhance their music experience.
> <sub>Revive unavailable songs for Netease Cloud Music</sub>

> `#UUID Generation` `#URL Safe` `#Custom Alphabet` 
> shortuuid is a simple Python library that generates concise, unambiguous, and URL-safe UUIDs. It translates UUIDs to base57 encoding, avoiding similar-looking characters, making it suitable for non-sequential IDs displayed to users. The library supports custom alphabets and length settings, offering various generation methods, including name-based UUIDs and cryptographically secure random strings, ideal for diverse application scenarios.
> <sub>A generator library for concise, unambiguous and URL-safe UUIDs.</sub>

> Consolidation\Cgr offers a safer alternative to the `composer global require` command. By installing PHP command-line tools in isolated directories, it prevents dependency conflicts between different projects, ensuring higher installation success rates. Cgr is ideal for PHP developers needing to install command-line tools globally and supports setting minimum stability for projects, enhancing flexibility and control.
> <sub>Safe replacement for `composer global require`</sub>

> Jenssegers/date is a date handling library based on Carbon, offering multi-language support. It extends Carbon's functionality, allowing methods like date formatting and time differences to be translated based on user locale, making it suitable for applications requiring internationalization. The library is compatible with the Laravel framework, facilitating efficient date and time management in multi-language environments.

> Carbon is an international PHP extension for DateTime, offering extensive date and time manipulation capabilities. It supports over 200 languages and 500 regional variants, allowing for easy time calculations, formatting, and comparisons. With a clean and user-friendly API, Carbon is ideal for PHP developers dealing with complex date-time logic, widely used in web development and data processing scenarios.
> <sub>A simple PHP API extension for DateTime.</sub>

Key features include support for various notification types (info, success, warning, error), configurable animations, and customizable styles.

> Pipenv is a virtual environment management tool designed for Python developers, aimed at simplifying dependency management and environment configuration for projects. It automatically creates and manages virtual environments, using Pipfile and Pipfile.lock to ensure deterministic builds, addressing the issues of using pip and virtualenv separately. Pipenv emphasizes security, supports the latest dependency versions, and provides insights into the dependency graph, significantly optimizing the development workflow.
> <sub>Python Development Workflow for Humans.</sub>

The project's technical highlights include various pre-trained models, sentiment analysis tools, and knowledge graph construction capabilities, making it ideal for implementing and exploring various NLP tasks.

## acmesh-official/acme.sh

> [!info]
> ŌŁÉ 46,823 ┬Ę Shell ┬Ę 2026-06-05  
> [GitHub](https://github.com/acmesh-official/acme.sh) ┬Ę [Website](https://acme.sh)  
> `#ACME protocol` `#SSL automation` `#Shell scripting` `#Wildcard certificates` `#acme` `#acme-challenge` `#acme-protocol` `#acme-v2` `#ash` `#bash` `#buypass` `#certbot` `#lets-encrypt` `#posix` `#posix-sh` `#shell` `#ssl` `#ssl-certificate` `#ssl-certificates` `#tls` `#tls-certificate` `#zerossl` 
> acme.sh is a pure Unix shell script ACME client for automating SSL/TLS certificate issuance and renewal. It fully implements the ACME protocol, supports ECDSA, SAN, and wildcard certificates, and runs on Bash, dash, and various OS including Linux, macOS, Windows, and BSD variants with minimal setup.
> <sub>A pure Unix shell script ACME client for SSL / TLS certificate automation</sub>

> elasticsearch-head is a web front-end tool for managing and visualizing data in Elasticsearch clusters. It can be run through various methods, including a local server, Docker, or as a Chrome extension, ensuring compatibility with different Elasticsearch versions. Key features include an intuitive interface and flexible connection options, enabling users to easily monitor and manage their Elasticsearch clusters.
> <sub>A web front end for an elastic search cluster</sub>

> redis-py is the Python client for Redis, offering an efficient interface for interacting with the Redis key-value store. The library supports multiple Redis versions and provides a straightforward API for data operations. Key features include support for the RESP3 protocol and optional hiredis performance optimization, making it suitable for Python developers needing efficient data access.
> <sub>Redis Python client</sub>

## bagder/ca-bundle

> [!info]
> ŌŁÉ 247 ┬Ę N/A ┬Ę 2026-05-14

> `#CA Certificates` `#Secure Connections` `#Mozilla` `#certificate-authorities` `#certificates` `#mozilla` `#pem` 
> This repository provides a PEM format backup of the Mozilla CA bundle, extracted and converted at regular intervals. Serving as a backup to the automated service on the curl website, users can access the latest CA certificate information to ensure secure connections. The project primarily supports applications relying on CA certificates, ensuring they can obtain the latest certificate data during updates.
> <sub>The Mozilla CA bundle extracted and converted to PEM. This repository functions as a backup to the automated service on the curl web site.</sub>

## rmax/scrapy-redis

> [!info]
> ŌŁÉ 5,639 ┬Ę Python ┬Ę 2026-05-19  
> [GitHub](https://github.com/rmax/scrapy-redis) ┬Ę [Website](http://scrapy-redis.readthedocs.io)  
> `#Distributed Crawling` `#Scrapy Extension` `#Redis Queue` `#JSON Data Support` `#crawler` `#distributed` `#redis` `#scrapy` 
> Scrapy-Redis is a Redis-based distributed extension for Scrapy, enabling multiple spider instances to share a single Redis queue for distributed crawling and post-processing. It offers plug-and-play components like scheduler, duplication filter, and item pipeline, ideal for large-scale multi-domain scraping. This fork adds JSON data support in Redis, allowing extraction of URL, meta, and form data to generate FormRequests automatically.
> <sub>Redis-based components for Scrapy.</sub>

## fideloper/TrustedProxy

> [!info]
> ŌŁÉ 7,312 ┬Ę PHP ┬Ę 2024-01-09  
> [GitHub](https://github.com/fideloper/TrustedProxy)  
> `#Laravel` `#Load Balancing` `#Reverse Proxy` 
> Laravel Trusted Proxies is a proxy package for Laravel that handles sessions when behind load balancers or other intermediaries. By setting trusted proxies, it ensures accurate URL generation, redirection, session handling, and logging when operating behind reverse proxies like Nginx or HAProxy. This package simplifies the configuration process, allowing developers to easily manage the real source of HTTP requests, ensuring application security and correctness.
> <sub>Laravel Proxy Package for handling sessions when behind load balancers or other intermediaries.</sub>

## microsoftarchive/redis

> ŌŁÉ 21,068 ┬Ę C ┬Ę 2019-07-18  
> [GitHub](https://github.com/microsoftarchive/redis) ┬Ę [Website](http://redis.io)  
> `#In-memory Database` `#Windows Port` `#High Performance Storage` 
> Redis is an in-memory database that supports various data types like strings, lists, and sets, with persistence to disk. This project is a Windows port, officially supporting 64-bit systems and offering installation as a Windows Service. Although no longer actively maintained, it remains useful for scenarios requiring Redis in a Windows environment, particularly for high-performance data storage and quick access applications.
> <sub>Redis is an in-memory database that persists on disk. The data model is key-value, but many different kind of values are supported: Strings, Lists, Sets, Sorted Sets, Hashes</sub>

> PocketFlow is an open-source framework designed to compress and accelerate deep learning models with minimal human intervention, enhancing inference efficiency for AI applications. The framework supports various model compression algorithms, allowing developers to specify desired compression or acceleration ratios, while PocketFlow automatically selects appropriate hyper-parameters to generate efficient compressed models, suitable for mobile devices with limited computational resources. Its simplified toolkit broadens the applicability of deep learning models across various domains.
> <sub>An Automatic Model Compression (AutoMC) framework for developing smaller and faster AI applications.</sub>
